items.headline: 'They looked like me': Why Arsenal became Africa's club
items.description: In Kenyan influencer Nana Owiti's wardrobe, dozens of Arsenal jerseys tell the story of her passion...

items.headline: Red Sox host Tampa Bay Rays, look to stop home losing streak
items.description:

Boston; Friday, 7:10 p.m. EDT
